items.summary: A lot of AI startups exist partly because the foundation models haven't expanded into their category yet. As many jokingly acknowledge, that won't last forever.

items.summary: The winning time is a massive improvement over last year’s race, when the fastest robot finished in two hours and 40 minutes.

items.summary: It's a major milestone for the company's new mega-rocket system, putting it in position to challenge SpaceX's dominance of the global launch market.

items.title: Tesla brings its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
items.title_zh: 特斯拉将其机器人出租车服务带到达拉斯和休斯顿
items.summary: The company now offers robotaxi service in three cities, all of them in Texas, after launching in Austin last year and starting to offer rides without safety drivers in January 2026.

items.title: VC Ron Conway says he has a ‘rare form of cancer’
items.title_zh: VC Ron Conway说他患有“罕见的癌症”
items.summary: Conway wrote that he “will be stepping back from some of my usual activities,” but he will “continue to support” founders backed by his firm SV Angel.

items.title: Blue Origin successfully reused its New Glenn rocket
items.title_zh: Blue Origin成功重复使用New Glenn火箭
items.summary: Today's launch of AST SpaceMobile's BlueBird 7 satellite aboard Blue Origin's reusable New Glenn rocket was a partial success. The New Glenn touched down on its landing pad without incident, making it the second launch and landing for the first stage booster, and officially giving Jeff Bezos a reusable launch vehicle. Unfortunately for AST SpaceMobile, […]

items.title: Cloud development platform Vercel was hacked
items.title_zh: 云开发平台Vercel遭黑客入侵
items.summary: Vercel, a major development platform that hosts and deploys web apps, was compromised, and the hackers are attempting to sell stolen data. A person claiming to be a member of ShinyHunters, which was behind the recent hack of Rockstar Games, posted some data online, including employee names, email addresses, and activity time stamps. Vercel confirmed […]

items.title: Nothing’s modular CMF Headphone Pro are down to their lowest price to date
items.title_zh: Nothing's模块化CMF Headphone Pro已降至迄今为止的最低价格
items.summary: Over the past several years, Nothing’s budget-centric subsidiary, CMF, has built a reputation for producing attractive, inexpensive products with features often reserved for gadgets that cost twice the price. The CMF Headphone Pro — the company’s first pair of over-ear wireless headphones — fit precisely in that lane, especially now that they’re on sale at […]

items.title: The Stars My Destination is classic proto-cyberpunk
items.title_zh: The Stars My Destination是经典的原型赛博朋克
items.summary: This might feel like a somewhat obvious recommendation to some, but it flew under my radar until now. Alfred Bester's The Stars My Destination (originally published as Tiger! Tiger! in the UK) is a 1956 sci-fi novel that some have cited as a precursor to cyberpunk. It's a work I admit I have some conflicted […]

items.title: Marathon battery life makes Keychron’s Ultra 8K keyboards its best yet
items.title_zh: 马拉松电池寿命使Keychron的Ultra 8K键盘成为迄今为止最好的键盘
items.summary: Keychron's expansive keyboard catalog covers everything from basic full-size mechanical boards to niche layouts like southpaw Alice or a one-handed half-keyboard for gaming. Its Q and V series are among our go-to recommendations for off-the-shelf keyboards, and the latest iterations - the Q and V Ultra models - are a straightforward upgrade to the lineup, […]

items.title: The future of local TV news has taken a Trumpian turn
items.title_zh: 本地电视新闻的未来已经发生了特朗普式的转变
items.summary: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more stories on Big Tech versus politics in Washington, DC, follow Tina Nguyen and read Regulator. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started A long time […]

items.title: The RAM shortage could last years
items.title_zh: 内存短缺可能会持续数年
items.summary: According to Nikkei Asia, even as suppliers ramp up DRAM production, manufacturers are only expected to meet 60 percent of demand by the end of 2027. SK Group chairman has even said that shortages could last until 2030. The world's largest memory makers - Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron - are all working to add […]

items.title: Judge rules Trump administration violated the First Amendment in fight against ICE-tracking
items.title_zh: 法官裁定特朗普政府在打击ICE跟踪方面违反了第一修正案
items.summary: Jorge L. Alonso, a federal district court judge for the Northern District of Illinois, said that the Trump Administration violated the First Amendment when it pressured Facebook and Apple to remove ICE-tracking groups and apps. Judge Alonso granted the plaintiffs, Kassandra Rosado, who runs the ICE Sightings - Chicagoland Facebook group, and Kreisau Group, the […]

items.title: Cheap stuff that doesn’t suck, take 3
items.title_zh: 便宜的东西不烂，吃3
items.summary: From fancy OLED TVs to robot vacuums with arms, we tend to cover a lot of cool stuff here at The Verge that, unfortunately, often costs as much as a month’s rent (or more). But with the ongoing tariff situation in the US and a global memory shortage pushing up the cost of, well, everything, we’re well aware that not […]

items.title: Dyson’s handheld fan is more powerful and louder than I expected
items.title_zh: 戴森的手持风扇比我想象的更强大、更响亮
items.summary: Two years ago I attended a picturesque outdoor wedding in August where the hot and humid weather had guests occasionally ducking into their cars to enjoy a blast of AC. Dyson’s new $99.99 handheld fan would have provided some much-needed relief then, although I’m not sure I would have been comfortable powering it up during […]

items.title: US intercepts and seizes Iranian-flagged cargo ship, Trump says
items.title_zh: 特朗普说，美国拦截并扣押悬挂伊朗国旗的货船
items.summary: Tehran vows retaliation soon for what it calls an "act of armed piracy", which comes as the US prepares for a second round of talks.

items.title: Eight children killed in Louisiana shooting, police say
items.title_zh: 警方称， 8名儿童在路易斯安那州枪击事件中丧生
items.summary: The children, aged from one to 14 years old, were killed in a shooting that police are describing as a "domestic disturbance".

items.title: Oil prices rise after Trump says Iranian ship seized
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗船只被扣后油价上涨
items.summary: Energy markets have seen wild swings since the US and Israel attacked Iran on 28 February.

items.title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
items.title_zh: 伊朗高级政治家告诉BBC ，德黑兰永远不会放弃对霍尔木兹海峡的控制
items.summary: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.

items.title: Ukraine police chief resigns after officers allegedly fled deadly shooting
items.title_zh: 乌克兰警察局长因涉嫌逃离致命枪击事件而辞职
items.summary: Authorities say the officers have been suspended and an investigation into their actions is under way.

items.title: Rat poison found in HiPP baby food jar in Austria, police say
items.title_zh: 警方称，在奥地利的HiPP婴儿食品罐中发现老鼠毒药
items.summary: The brand warned on Saturday that consuming the purées may be potentially "life-threatening".

items.title: Zelensky condemns US extension of Russian sanctions waiver
items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基谴责美国延长俄罗斯制裁豁免
items.summary: The US argues that the waiver is meant to ease the energy supply crunch sparked by the US-Israel war with Iran.

items.title: Rumen Radev looks set to win Bulgarian Parliamentary election
items.title_zh: 鲁门·拉德夫（ Rumen Radev ）有望赢得保加利亚议会选举
items.summary: Exit polls put his Progressive Bulgaria on 37%, more than double the score of the closest runner-up, but he will likely need to form a coalition to govern.

items.title: Thousands of Parisians evacuated as WW2 bomb detonated
items.title_zh: 成千上万的巴黎人在二战炸弹爆炸时撤离
items.summary: Residents within a 450m radius of the device were told to leave their homes while it was neutralised.

items.title: Ontario Premier Doug Ford agrees to sell $21m private jet following outcry
items.title_zh: 安大略省省长道格·福特在抗议后同意出售$ 2100万私人飞机
items.summary: After confirming the purchase on Friday, Ford drew critcism from political opponents who called it a "gravy plane" and "out of touch".

items.title: BBB 26: Contrato do reality deixa a cargo da Globo avisar sobre morte de familiar
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ：现实合同让Globo警告家人死亡
items.summary: O contrato do Big Brother Brasil, vazado após Pedro Henrique Espíndola processar a Globo, prevê os passos que podem ser tomados caso morra o parente próximo de um participante ainda confinado. Leia mais (04/20/2026 - 00h39)

items.title: BBB 26: Tadeu quebra protocolo e revela morte de Oscar Schmidt aos participantes
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ： Tadeu打破协议，向参与者透露Oscar Schmidt之死
items.summary: Tadeu Schmidt quebrou o protocolo ao conversar com os finalistas do BBB 26 logo após a saída de Leandro Boneco. Bastante emocionado, ele decidiu compartilhar seu luto com Ana Paula Renault, que já havia sido informada sobre a morte do pai, Gerardo Renault, neste domingo (19). Leia mais (04/20/2026 - 00h30)

items.title: BBB 26: Relembre falas de Ana Paula sobre o pai durante o programa
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ：记住Ana Paula在节目中关于她父亲的演讲
items.summary: O pai de Ana Paula Renault, Gerardo Renault, morreu neste domingo (19) em Belo Horizonte aos 96 anos de idade. A família decidiu não avisar a jornalista, que segue confinada no BBB 26 (Globo). Leia mais (04/20/2026 - 00h15)

items.title: Por que o BBB 26, marcado por expulsões, gerou debate sobre os limites da diversão
items.title_zh: 为什么以驱逐为标志的BBB 26引发了关于乐趣极限的争论
items.summary: Foram jogos vorazes, e chegou a parecer que não sobraria gente sã, mas o Big Brother Brasil 26 resistiu e vai exibir seu capítulo final nesta terça-feira (21). Leia mais (04/20/2026 - 00h10)

items.title: BBB 26: Ana Paula, Juliano Floss e Milena Moreira são os finalistas da edição; vote na enquete
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ： Ana Paula、Juliano Floss和Milena Moreira入围决赛；在民意调查中投票
items.summary: Ana Paula Renault, Milena Moreira e Juliano Floss stão na final do BBB 26. Um dos participantes vai levar o prêmio de R$ 5,4 milhões na próxima terça-feira (21). Leia mais (04/20/2026 - 00h10)

items.title: BBB 26: Aos prantos, Ana Paula conta para Milena sobre a morte de seu pai
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ： Ana Paula泪流满面地告诉Milena她父亲的死讯
items.summary: A jornalista Ana Paula Renault foi informada pela produção do BBB 26 (Globo) sobre a morte de seu pai, Gerardo Renault, neste domingo (19). Após o resultado do último paredão da temporada, ela contou a notícia para Milena Moreira. Leia mais (04/20/2026 - 00h04)

items.title: BBB 26: Morte do pai de Ana Paula Renault une rivais no reality
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ： Ana Paula Renault的父亲之死在现实中团结了竞争对手
items.summary: Adversários no jogo, mas solidários fora dele. A morte do pai de Ana Paula Renault, Gerardo Henrique Machado Renault, mobilizou participantes do BBB 26, que deixaram de lado as rivalidades para prestar apoio à colega de confinamento. Em meio à disputa acirrada pelo prêmio de R$ 5,4 milhões, brothers e sisters demonstraram empatia diante da perda, com mensagens de carinho e gestos de acolhimento que repercutiram dentro e fora da casa. Leia mais (04/19/2026 - 23h54)

items.title: BBB 26: Leandro Boneco é eliminado com 52,19% dos votos
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ： Leandro Boneco以52.19 ％的选票被淘汰出局
items.summary: Leandro Rocha, o Boneco, é o último eliminado do BBB 26 (Globo), com 52,19% dos votos. O anúncio da eliminação foi dado por Tadeu Schmidt na noite deste domingo 919). Milena Moreira (43,30%) e Ana Paula Renault (4,51%) disputaram a berlinda com o brother. Leia mais (04/19/2026 - 23h48)

items.title: BBB 26: 'As saudades são muitas', disse pai de Ana Paula Renault em última mensagem a ela
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ：安娜·保拉·雷诺（ Ana Paula Renault ）的父亲在给她的最后一条消息中说： “思乡之情很多。”
items.summary: No último vídeo que gravou para Ana Paula Renault, na reta final do BBB 26, o pai da jornalista falava da saudades e da torcida por ela. "Oi, filhinha, tudo bem? As saudades são muitas. Estou torcendo por você. Um beijo carinhoso do seu pai, que te ama muito", disse Gerardo Renault. Leia mais (04/19/2026 - 23h31)

items.title: BBB 26: 'A única pessoa que eu tinha era ele', desabafa Ana Paula após saber da morte do pai
items.title_zh: BBB 26 ： “我唯一拥有的人就是他，” Ana Paula在得知父亲去世后说道
items.summary: A produção do BBB 26 (Globo) decidiu avisar Ana Paula Renault sobre a morte do pai, ocorrida no começo da noite deste domingo (19), em Belo Horizonte, apesar da família da jornalista ter dito que não iria avisá-la antes da final do programa. Leia mais (04/19/2026 - 23h29)

items.title: World weighs fate of Mideast ceasefire after US seizes Iranian cargo ship
items.title_zh: 在美国扣押伊朗货船后，世界权衡中东停火的命运
items.summary: Concerns grew on Monday that the ceasefire between the United States and Iran might not hold after the US said it had seized an Iranian cargo ship that tried to run its blockade and Iran vowed to retaliate.

items.title: Unmasking the Kartini 'fairy tale' and the cost of performance
items.title_zh: 揭开卡尔蒂尼“童话”的面纱，了解演出成本
items.summary: We were taught that Kartini’s brilliance was a gift, but we rarely talk about the patriarchal strings attached to her platform. It’s time to stop performing in a show we never auditioned for and start building a self that doesn't require external permission to exist.

items.title: Fossil-fuel investments are a fiduciary risk
items.title_zh: 化石燃料投资是一种信托风险
items.summary: The global fallout from the United States-Israeli war against Iran war demonstrates once again that for investors, fossil fuels are not just another commodity exposure, but a geopolitical liability.

items.title: Indonesia sends condolences over death of French peacekeeper in Lebanon
items.title_zh: 印度尼西亚对法国维和人员在黎巴嫩逝世表示哀悼
items.summary: Indonesia has extended its deepest condolences to France over the death of its peacekeeper in southern Lebanon, reiterating its call for enhanced protection of the United Nations peacekeeping missions in the war-torn Middle East country.

items.title: Govt introduces nutrition grade on drinks to curb unhealthy diets
items.title_zh: 政府在饮料中引入营养等级，以遏制不健康饮食
items.summary: The new policy classifies drinks from A to D with corresponding color codes based on the percentage of sugar, salt and fat content per 100 milliliters of sugary drinks, which determined with lab testing supervised by authorities.

items.title: Beyond oil: What is Prabowo’s energy diplomacy really securing?
items.title_zh: 超越石油：普拉博沃的能源外交真正确保了什么？
items.summary: As Prabowo spreads his diplomatic wings and travels the world making deals to secure immediate, future and broader energy needs, the real issue at hand is whether the country's energy transition can take flight as part of a comprehensive strategy once he lands back in Jakarta.

items.title: Law expert reported over food self-sufficiency remarks as clampdown against crit...
items.title_zh: 法律专家报告称，食品自给自足言论是对批评的镇压。
items.summary: Constitutional law expert Feri Amsari became the latest government critic to be reported to the police over comments on the food self-sufficiency program.

items.title: Kalla denies blasphemy allegations, says remarks taken out of context
items.title_zh: 卡拉否认亵渎指控，称言论断章取义
items.summary: Former vice president Jusuf Kalla has denied allegations of blasphemy over remarks he made during a public lecture last month, and is considering legal recourse against his accusers who he said took his comments out of context in a way that defames him.

items.title: Wikimedia to meet government after access block threat
items.title_zh: 维基媒体在访问屏蔽威胁后与政府会面
items.summary: The Communications and Digital Ministry gave an ultimatum for the nonprofit platform to register as an electronic system provider (PSE) in the country for seven days from April 15 to prevent a permanent block on its projects’ websites.

items.title: From strategic dependency to strategic diversification: The energy shock moment
items.title_zh: 从战略依赖到战略多元化：能源冲击时刻
items.summary: Despite its resource endowment, Indonesia remains structurally dependent on imported fuel, particularly refined petroleum products sourced largely from regional hubs.

items.title: 'Blockade main obstacle': Iran rejects second round of talks with US in Pakistan
items.title_zh: “封锁主要障碍” ：伊朗拒绝与美国在巴基斯坦举行第二轮会谈
items.summary: Iran has rejected further peace talks with the United States, citing excessive demands, shifting positions, and ongoing naval confrontations. Tehran blames Washington's "coercive measures," including a naval blockade and recent maritime incidents, for the breakdown in diplomacy and a negative atmosphere for negotiations.

items.title: 'I have killed my children': Haunting call made by UP man after slitting throats of two daughters
items.title_zh: “我杀了我的孩子” ： UP MAN在割断两个女儿的喉咙后发出的令人难以忘怀的电话
items.summary: A father in Kanpur allegedly strangled and slit the throats of his 11-year-old twin daughters after sedating them. The pharmaceutical businessman was arrested after reporting the crime himself. Police suspect mental stress, depression, and financial problems as motives for the horrific act.

items.title: India's 150kmph bowling hope still lives in village without roads - Inside Ashok's dream
items.title_zh: 印度150公里/小时的保龄球希望仍然生活在没有道路的村庄-阿肖克的梦想
items.summary: Ashok Sharma is being touted as the next big thing from India's fast bowling stable. But in his village, Rampura, on the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway, around 35 km from Rajasthan's capital Jaipur, his family speaks about his biggest dream -- the blue jersey. Ashok Sharma has picked up six wickets in five matches this season so far for Gujarat Titans.

items.title: Watch: Moment US Navy intercepts Iranian cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 观看：美国海军在霍尔木兹海峡拦截伊朗货船的时刻
items.summary: The US Navy intercepted and boarded an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel, the TOUSKA, in the Gulf of Oman after it ignored warnings and attempted to bypass a blockade. The USS Spruance disabled the ship's propulsion, and US Marines took custody. In retaliation, Iran launched drones towards US warships.

items.title: Anthropic CEO 'knows absolutely nothing' about AI effects on jobs, says Godfather of AI
items.title_zh: 人工智能教父表示， Anthropic首席执行官对人工智能对工作的影响“一无所知”
items.summary: AI expert Yann LeCun disagrees with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei's forecast of AI eliminating many entry-level jobs. LeCun suggests economists are better equipped to analyze technological impacts on employment. Amodei previously warned AI could replace a significant portion of white-collar roles within five years, calling AI a general labor substitute.

items.title: Nagpur NGO chief accused of sex abuse, religious coercion of several young women
items.title_zh: 那格浦尔非政府组织负责人被指控对几名年轻女性进行性虐待和宗教胁迫
items.summary: An NGO president in Nagpur was arrested for allegedly sexually abusing young women, religious coercion, defamation, and cyberstalking. The FIR details multiple incidents of harassment, including unwanted advances and monitoring staff. Intelligence agencies are now investigating the NGO's background and finances.

items.title: Muzarabani PSL ban: PCB admits ‘no contract’ but stands firm on punishment
items.title_zh: Muzarabani PSL禁令： PCB承认“没有合同” ，但坚决反对惩罚
items.summary: The Pakistan Cricket Board acknowledged no formal contract was sent to Blessing Muzarabani for the PSL but defended his two-year ban, citing a verbal agreement. Muzarabani's agent refuted this, stating a contract is needed for an NOC, and called the ban excessive. The dispute arose after Muzarabani opted for the IPL over the PSL.

items.title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for April 20 week - check list

items.summary: ​Stock market recommendations: Bharat Electronics, and MTAR Technologies are the top stock recommendations by Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk for this trading week starting April 20, 2026. The brokerage shares the target prices and rationale.

items.title: When Palantir CEO said working at billion dollar company better than degree from Harvard
items.title_zh: 当Palantir首席执行官说在价值十亿美元的公司工作比哈佛大学的学位更好时
items.summary: Palantir CEO Alex Karp declared that working at the company is a superior credential to degrees from elite universities. He emphasized that Palantir's environment makes prior educational backgrounds irrelevant, positioning the company itself as the ultimate career asset.

items.title: 'Mai match chheen sakta hoon': Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's bold warning

items.summary: Young batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is continuing his fiery form in IPL 2026, becoming Rajasthan Royals' highest run-getter with 246 runs in 6 matches at a strike rate of 236.54. The 15-year-old aims to contribute to the senior Indian team after fulfilling his father's dream of playing in the World Cup.

items.summary: Probe agency ED has accused Sonia Gandhi and Rahul Gandhi of conspiracy and money laundering.

items.title: 米南部で銃乱射事件 子ども8人死亡 7人は容疑者自身の子ども
items.title_zh: 八名儿童在美国南部的一次枪击事件中丧生，其中七名嫌疑人是自己的孩子。
items.summary: アメリカ南部のルイジアナ州で19日、男が銃を乱射し、子ども8人が死亡しました。死亡した子どものうち、7人は容疑者自身の子どもだということで、警察は、家庭内の問題が背景にあるとみて捜査しています。

items.title: 米軍がイラン船籍の船舶をだ捕か 2回目協議に向け駆け引き続く
items.title_zh: 美国武装部队第二次扣押悬挂伊朗国旗的船只或继续谈判
items.summary: アメリカのトランプ大統領はアメリカの代表団がイランとの対面協議のため仲介国パキスタンに向かうと表明しました。一方、イランはアメリカによる海上封鎖などを理由に協議に応じない姿勢を示しているほか、イラン沖のオマーン湾ではアメリカ軍の艦船がイラン船籍の船舶に砲撃を行ってだ捕したとみられ、2回目の対面協議の実現に向けた双方の駆け引きが続きそうです。

items.title: 株価 午前は値上がり イラン情勢不透明で様子見も
items.title_zh: 早上股价上涨，伊朗形势不明朗，所以我等了又等。
items.summary: 週明けの20日の東京株式市場は、アメリカとイランの協議が実現するかが不透明だとして積極的な取り引きが控えられる中、好調な業績への期待から半導体関連の銘柄に買い注文が入り、日経平均株価は値上がりしています。

items.title: 日本海側などで午前中から夏日に 水分補給など体調管理に注意
items.title_zh: 注意身体状况管理，例如从早上到夏天在日本海一侧补充水分
items.summary: 20日は暖かい空気が流れ込んで各地で気温が上がり、日本海側などで午前中から25度以上の夏日となっているところがあります。午後も気温が上がり、夏日となる地域が増える見込みでこまめに水分を補給するなど体調の管理に注意してください。

items.title: 北朝鮮 “戦術弾道ミサイル搭載のクラスター弾など 発射実験”
items.title_zh: 朝鲜“测试使用战术弹道导弹发射集束弹药”
items.summary: 北朝鮮のメディアは、戦術弾道ミサイルに搭載するクラスター弾などの威力を確認する発射実験が19日に行われたと伝えました。北朝鮮が19日に日本海に向けて発射した短距離弾道ミサイル数発を指すとみられます。

items.title: ドジャース 大谷翔平51試合連続出塁 佐々木朗希は5回途中3失点
items.title_zh: 道奇队大谷昌平连续51个垒佐佐木亮树5次进3球
items.summary: 大リーグ、ドジャースの大谷翔平選手がロッキーズ戦でタイムリーツーベースヒットを含む2安打1打点をマークし、連続出塁記録を51試合に伸ばしました。また、この試合に佐々木朗希投手が先発しましたが5回途中3失点で交代し、チームも敗れてドジャースは今シーズン初の2連敗となりました。

items.title: Lee vows to better ensure rights of people with disabilities
items.title_zh: 李发誓要更好地确保残疾人的权利
items.summary: President Lee Jae Myung on Monday vowed efforts to better ensure the rights of the disabled in a message to mark the Day of Persons with Disabilities. In a Facebook post, Lee highlighted the difficulties faced by people with disabilities, sharing his own experience of a workplace accident when he was a child laborer that left him with a disabled arm. "(I) will pay careful attention so that your today becomes more comfortable and your tomorrow more free," he wrote. "As someone who acquired a disability from a workplace accident, I feel this reality deeply." He noted that his government is working to establish a comprehensive health care management plan for the disabled while also pushing for legislation to better ensure the rights of people with disabilities. "(I) will fulfill my responsibilities so that disabilities do not determine the possibilities of life in all areas, including care, education, culture and employment."

items.title: Exception sought for HYBE chairman's US trip despite travel ban: report
items.title_zh: 尽管有旅行禁令，但HYBE主席的美国之行仍寻求例外：报告
items.summary: It has been reported that the U.S. requested cooperation from the Korean National Police Agency (KNPA) regarding a visit to the United States by HYBE Chairman Bang Si-hyuk and other senior executives, despite Bang being subject to an overseas travel ban tied to a police investigation. Critics say the move may constitute a breach of diplomatic norms, as the U.S. allegedly bypassed formal diplomatic channels and directly singled out individuals under travel bans in a request to a foreign investigative agency. According to an April 19 report by the Hankook Ilbo, the U.S. Embassy in Seoul recently delivered a letter to the acting commissioner general of the KNPA requesting cooperation to allow HYBE senior executives — chairman Bang Si-hyuk, CEO Lee Jae-sang and vice president Kim Hyun-jung — to travel to the United States. The stated reasons for the their U.S. visit reportedly included attending celebrations marking the 250th anniversary of Independence Day on July 4, as well as supporting BTS during the group’s U.S. leg of its world tour. Earlier, Donald Trump announced plans for an

items.title: Korea to run promotion booth at defense exhibition in Malaysia
items.title_zh: 韩国将在马来西亚举办的国防展上举办促销摊位
items.summary: Korea will run a promotion booth at a major defense exhibition in Malaysia this week aimed at promoting homegrown arms products eyeing entry into the Southeast Asian market, the state arms procurement agency said Monday. The Defence Services Asia (DSA) 2026, scheduled for a four-day run from Monday to Thursday in Kuala Lumpur, will be attended by the Defense Acquisition Program Administration (DAPA) and the Korea Research Institute for Defense Technology Planning and Advancement. The DSA is the largest arms exhibition in Asia, hosted by Malaysia's defense ministry, bringing together some 1,400 defense firms and government and military officials from around 60 countries. This year, eight Korean defense firms will showcase a range of new products featuring advanced technology, such as hull-mounted sonars for minesweepers, underwater drones and artificial intelligence-based command decision support systems. DAPA also plans to cooperate with the state-run Korea Trade-Investment Promotion Agency to facilitate consultations between foreign buyers and local defense firms as part of its bid to s

items.title: Lee's approval rating hits record high 65.5%: poll
items.title_zh: Lee的支持率达到创纪录的65.5 ％ ：民意调查
items.summary: President Lee Jae Myung's approval rating has hit a record high of 65.5 percent since his inauguration in June last year on achievements in the economy and energy security, a poll showed Monday. According to a survey conducted by Realmeter and commissioned by EKN newspaper, 65.5 percent of the 2,519 respondents aged 18 or older positively assessed Lee's performance, up 3.6 percentage points from the previous poll. The previous high was 64.6 percent in the second week of July last year. Also in the latest survey, conducted nationwide from last Monday until Friday, 30 percent of the respondents viewed Lee's performance negatively, down 2.8 percentage points from the previous poll, while 4.5 percent said they were unsure. "The increase in the approval rate was driven by achievements in the economy and energy security, such as the securing of large amounts of crude oil amid the Middle East crisis and the KOSPI's recovery to the 6,200-point level," the pollster said. Lee's hard-line remarks on Israel's alleged mistreatment of Palestinians and his attendance at a ceremony commemorating the 2014

items.title: Remains of centenarian independence fighter to return home this week
items.title_zh: 百岁独立战士遗骸本周回国
items.summary: The remains of centenarian independence activist Lee Ha-jun, who fought under the 1910-1945 Japanese colonial rule, will return home this week from the United States to be laid to rest at a national cemetery, the veterans ministry said Monday. Lee, who took part in various independence movements, died at his home in California in February at the age of 104. He was the oldest surviving independence fighter living abroad. His remains will arrive at Incheon International Airport, Gyeonggi Province, on Tuesday ahead of a repatriation ceremony scheduled to take place at Seoul National Cemetery the following day. His remains will then be laid to rest at Daejeon National Cemetery, alongside his deceased wife. A total of 156 remains of independence fighters, including Lee, have returned home since a project to repatriate independence patriots began in 1946, according to the ministry. Only four surviving independence fighters remain in Korea.

items.title: Young Koreans flock to Daiso amid high inflation
items.title_zh: 在高通胀背景下，韩国年轻人涌向Daiso
items.summary: A Daiso store in Sinchon, western Seoul, was crowded with college students on Wednesday evening. “There’s something fun about shopping at Daiso,” said Song Seung-min, a 26-year-old college student who stopped by to browse the cosmetics section. “It makes me feel rich because I can buy all kinds of things without actually spending much.” Thrift-driven spending grows amid high inflation The rising popularity of Daiso shopping is part of an emerging consumer trend among Koreans in their 20s and 30s called “small indulgences.” Rather than cutting back on spending altogether, the trend refers to a selective pattern of consumption seeking enjoyment and satisfaction at a lower cost. These consumption trends are driven by high inflation, which has persisted since 2022. According to Statistics Korea, the consumer price index rose 5.1 percent that year, marking the start of a sustained period of elevated inflation. At the time, online communities and social media were flooded with content such as the “no-spend challenge,” in which people tried to avoid spending for a set period, a

items.title: Why Korea University is nurturing critical thinkers to prepare for AI era
items.title_zh: 为什么韩国大学正在培养批判性思维者为人工智能时代做准备
items.summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) rapidly reshapes classrooms and research, universities are being called to redefine their role — not as passive adopters of technology, but as institutions that cultivate individuals capable of using AI as a tool while safeguarding human dignity and intellectual autonomy. Korea University unveiled “Next Intelligence” as its core vision to mark its 120th anniversary last year and has continued to advance the concept since. It frames intelligence as a partnership between humans and AI, working together to enhance and extend each other’s capabilities rather than compete for dominance. “The core mission of university education is no longer simply to deliver knowledge,” Korea University President Kim Dong-one told The Korea Times in a recent interview. “It is to fulfill the role of a Next Intelligence University — one that teaches what AI cannot replace: how to ask meaningful questions and how to choose values.” He emphasized that the rise of AI presents both new opportunities and fundamental challenges for universities. “The current moment

items.title: Saudi Arabia among 10 countries welcoming Libya’s unified budget agreement
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯是欢迎利比亚统一预算协议的10个国家之一
items.summary: RIYADH — Ten countries, including Saudi Arabia, welcomed on Sunday the signing of a unified 2026 budget for Libya, the first Libyan national budget in over a decade and a critical step to increase economic coordination between western and eastern Libyan leaders. “We applaud their constructive approach to reach this agreement, which has the potential to foster increased unity, stability, and prosperity for Libya,” they said in a joint statement. The countries also include the United States of America, the United Kingdom, Egypt, France, Germany, Italy, Qatar, Türkiye, and the United Arab Emirates.Full implementation of the unified budget, signed on April 11, will help advance Libya’s financial stability, defend the value of the dinar and the Libyan people’s purchasing power, enable the implementation of development projects and international investment across Libya, and strengthen Libya’s vital technocratic institutions, including the Central Bank of Libya, National Oil Corporation, and Libyan Audit Bureau. The unified budget includes the National Oil Corporation's first operational budget in years and financing to increase energy production, as well as oversight provisions to ensure these funds are used effectively. Increased oil and gas production will drive greater prosperity for the Libyan people and their international partners and contribute to regional and global energy security.“We reaffirm our support for the United Nations Support Mission in Libya (UNSMIL) and the roadmap developed by UN Special Representative of the Secretary General Hanna Tetteh and urge all stakeholders to use this roadmap and UNSMIL facilitation to advance a Libyan-led political process leading to unified governance and national elections. Increased economic integration will complement and strengthen the political process,” the statement said, adding “a strong and prosperous Libya with unified economic, military, and political institutions is in all of our interests.”

items.title: Interior minister approves strategic plan for Crime Research Center
items.title_zh: 内政部长批准犯罪研究中心的战略计划
items.summary: RIYADH — Minister of Interior Prince Abdulaziz bin Saud bin Naif has approved the strategic plan for the Crime Research Center. The plan was prepared with the participation of experts in criminal research and analysis and supported by the ministry’s International Partnerships Program.The plan focuses on developing research and analytical work through building a comprehensive crime database, qualifying specialized personnel in criminology, using artificial intelligence to analyze data and predict crime, and strengthening partnerships with national and international universities and research centers.It provides a framework to support specialized studies and produce scientific knowledge, contributing to equipping security decision-makers with evidence-based information and enhancing preventive efforts.The plan aligns with the objectives of Saudi Vision 2030, supporting initiatives aimed at improving quality of life through strengthened crime prevention.

items.title: Saudi-Indian talks focus on supporting energy security and stability of its supplies
items.title_zh: 沙特-印度会谈的重点是支持能源安全和其供应的稳定
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Minister of Energy Prince Abdulaziz bin Salman met with the National Security Advisor of India Ajit Doval in Riyadh on Sunday. During the meeting, they discussed ways to enhance bilateral cooperation between the two countries in the energy sector. The efforts to support energy security and the stability of its supplies were figured high in their talks. The meeting was held in the presence of Minister of State, Member of the Council of Ministers and National Security Advisor Dr. Musaed Al-Aiban. Meanwhile, Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan held talks with Ajit Doval at the ministry's headquarters in Riyadh. During the meeting, they reviewed areas of joint cooperation. They discussed the latest developments in the region. The meeting was attended by Undersecretary of the Ministry for Political Affairs Dr. Saud Al-Sati.

items.title: Civil Defense urges caution amid forecast of thunderstorms hitting across Saudi Arabia through Friday
items.title_zh: 民防部门敦促谨慎行事，因为预计到周五沙特阿拉伯将发生雷暴
items.summary: RIYADH — The General Directorate of Civil Defense has urged the public to exercise caution amid forecast of the National Center for Meteorology (NCM) about continued thunderstorms hitting across Saudi Arabia until Friday. The Civil Defense called on the people to remain in safe locations, stay away from areas prone to flash floods and valleys, refrain from swimming in them. It urged them to adhere to instructions disseminated through various media outlets and social media platforms. According to the NCM forecast, the Makkah region will be affected by moderate to heavy rain, leading to flash floods, hail, and dust storms. This includes the areas such as Turbah, Al-Mawiyah, Al-Khurma, Raniya, Taif, Maysan, Adham, and Al-Ardiyat. Light to moderate rain is expected in Makkah, Al-Jumum, and Al-Kamil.The Riyadh region will also be affected by moderate to heavy rain leading to flash floods, hail, and dust storms. This includes the capital city of Riyadh, as well as Al-Dalam, Al-Muzahmiyah, Dhurma, Marat, Al-Qiddiyah, Al-Diriyah, Al-Rayn, Al-Hariq, Al-Kharj, Hawtat Bani Tamim, Afeef, Al-Dawadmi, Al-Quway'iyah, Al-Ghat, Al-Zulfi, Al-Majma'a, Shaqra, Thadiq, Huraymila, and Rumah. The NCM stated that the regions of Madinah, Hail, Qassim, Northern Borders, Eastern Province, Tabuk, Al-Jouf, Al-Baha, Asir, Jazan, and Najran will also be affected by moderate to heavy rain, leading to flash floods, hail, and dust storms.

items.title: Saudi, Iraqi foreign ministers discuss regional developments in phone call
items.title_zh: 沙特，伊拉克外交部长在电话中讨论地区发展
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Minister of Foreign Affairs Prince Faisal bin Farhan received on Sunday a phone call from Iraqi Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs Dr. Fuad Mohammed Hussein. During the call, they discussed current regional developments and issues of common interest.

items.title: Makkah police arrest Sudanese resident for promoting fake entry permits
items.title_zh: 麦加警方以宣传伪造入境许可为由逮捕苏丹居民
items.summary: MAKKAH — Makkah police arrested a Sudanese resident for publishing fraudulent advertisements on social media, offering fake permits to enter Makkah. The security authorities stated that the suspect was referred to the Public Prosecution after completing the legal procedures. Public Security reiterated the importance of complying with Hajj regulations and instructions. It urged the public to report violations by calling over the number 911 in the regions of Makkah, Madinah, Riyadh, and the Eastern Province and 999 in other regions of the Kingdom.

items.title: Relocating car showrooms and scrap yards from South Jeddah’s Al-Jawhara neighborhood to Al-Khumra begins
items.title_zh: 开始将汽车展厅和废料场从南吉达的Al-Jawhara社区搬迁到Al-Khumra
items.summary: JEDDAH — The relocation of car showrooms, workshops, scrap yards, and junkyards from Al-Jawhara district to Al-Khumra in South Jeddah began on Sunday. This follows serving of a final warning issued by the Jeddah Mayoralty in this regard. Earlier, the mayoralty notified owners and occupants of the sites to vacate or modify their land use in accordance with the approved regulatory guidelines. Sources told Okaz that a large number of owners have begun relocating their businesses to "Car City" in Al-Khumra so as to avoid legal procedures and comply with the new zoning requirements aimed at reorganizing land use in the area. The evacuation decision, according to the Jeddah Mayoralty, was based on directives aimed at organizing and developing Prince Mohammed bin Salman Corridor and its adjacent areas, thereby enhancing the quality of the urban landscape and improving the built environment in southern Jeddah. In its warning, the mayoralty emphasized that all owners and occupants of sites within the designated area must change the land use designation according to the approved regulatory guidelines, immediately remove all elements of visual pollution, vacate the sites, and rectify their conditions to comply with the new use. The mayoralty stressed that in case of non-compliance, the necessary legal measures will be taken, including the on-site removal of violations, while disclaiming responsibility for any damage or losses that may be incurred to properties as a result of the removal and reorganization work.

items.title: Maximum fine of SR900 for driving a deceased person's vehicle without authorization
items.title_zh: 擅自驾驶死者车辆最高罚款SR900
items.summary: RIYADH — A maximum fine of SR900 will be slapped as a penalty for driving a deceased person’s vehicle without authorization. The penalty also includes impounding of the vehicle until the violation is rectified. The Public Security Directorate has proposed an amendment to the Traffic Law by adding a clause in this regard.The directorate has presented the proposal via the Istitlaa platform for public feedback before its approval. Amending paragraph four of Article 68 of the Traffic Law adds the offense of driving a vehicle, owned by a deceased person, without authorization to that vehicle as a traffic violation within the schedule of violations attached to the Traffic Law. The fine for this offense ranges from a minimum of SR500 to a maximum of SR900, in addition to impounding the vehicle until the violation is rectified. It should be noted that paragraph four of Article 68 of the Traffic Law already lists violations that result in vehicle impoundment, but only for driving a vehicle owned by a living person without authorization. The proposed amendment adds the clause "owned by a deceased person without authorization to that vehicle." The amendment aims to encourage the heirs of the deceased or their legal representative to promptly rectify the status of the deceased’s vehicle. It also aims to impound the vehicle until its status is corrected if any heir or other party drives it without proper authorization. This would prevent evading responsibility for traffic violations or accidents, thus ensuring the safety of all road users. The amendment would be supportive to security and traffic sectors in tracking down vehicles, whose owners passed away, and working to rectify their status. It would also incentivize heirs of the deceased to expedite the process of correcting the vehicle's status, thereby creating a safer traffic environment. This would be achieved by prohibiting the driving of such vehicles on the roads until their status is rectified, and by ensuring that necessary measures are taken regarding these vehicles, including verifying their roadworthiness, subjecting them to periodic inspections, insurance, and other traffic regulations. The amendment would help determine liability in the event of accidents or traffic violations, thereby reducing the burden on government agencies and ensuring the continued legal use of vehicles.

items.title: Supreme Court announces Sunday first day of Dhul Qada
items.title_zh: 最高法院宣布周日为Dhul Qada的第一天
items.summary: RIYADH — The Supreme Court of Saudi Arabia announced that the crescent moon was not sighted on Friday evening and hence Saturday was the 30th day of Shawwal and Sunday is the first day of Dhul Qada. In its official decision, the Crescent Sighting Committee at the Supreme Court explained that it had reviewed reports from the courts regarding the sighting of the crescent moon of Dhul Qada for the year 1447 AH on Friday evening, the 29th of Shawwal 1447 AH, according to the Umm Al-Qura calendar, corresponding to April 17, 2026. The committee explained that, based on what was reported to it in this regard, it was decided that Saturday, April 18, would be the completion of the month of Shawwal with 30 days, in view of receiving no testimony of sighting the crescent and therefore Sunday would be the first day of the month of Dhul Qada.

items.title: Transport minister visits Makkah Route Initiative terminal at Jeddah airport
items.title_zh: 交通部长访问吉达机场的麦加路线倡议航站楼
items.summary: JEDDAH — Minister of Transport and Logistics Saleh Al-Jasser visited the dedicated terminal for the Makkah Route Initiative at King Abdulaziz International Airport in Jeddah on Saturday. He received pilgrims who arrived under the initiative from Bangladesh. The minister was briefed on the procedures implemented to facilitate pilgrims’ journeys, accelerate processing times, and deliver high-quality services that enable them to perform their rituals in ease and comfort.The Ministry of Interior has been implementing the Makkah Route initiative for the eighth year in 2026. This year the number of beneficiary countries of this initiative rose to 10 with the addition of Senegal and Brunei Darussalam for the first time. Other countries are Morocco, Indonesia, Malaysia, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Turkey, Ivory Coast, and the Maldives. Since its launch in 2017, the initiative has served 1,254,994 pilgrims until last Hajj. The first groups of pilgrims from Turkiye, Pakistan and Malaysia under the Makkah Route Initiative arrived in Madinah on Saturday while the first flight from Bangladesh under the initiative landed in Jeddah. The Makkah Route initiative aims to provide streamlined high-quality services for pilgrims from participating countries by receiving them and facilitating their entry procedures in their home countries. These services include collecting biometric data, issuing Hajj visas electronically, and finalizing passport procedures at departure airports after verifying compliance with health requirements. The initiative also ensures the tagging and sorting of luggage in accordance with transportation and accommodation arrangements within the Kingdom. Upon arrival, pilgrims are transported directly via dedicated routes to their accommodations in Makkah and Madinah regions, while partner entities handle the delivery of their luggage.
